name: Calculate LP Range Ticks
description: Compute tick-spacing-aligned lower and upper tick bounds centered on the pool's current price
detail: Reads the pool's current tick from slot0, converts the given basis-point half-width to an equivalent tick offset, and returns a symmetric range aligned to the pool's tickSpacing. Use this before minting a new position or rebalancing to get properly aligned ticks. A rangeBps of 500 produces a ±5% range around the current price.

pool.description: Uniswap V3 pool address to read current price from

rangeBps.description: Half-width of the position range in basis points (e.g. 500 = ±5% from current price, 1000 = ±10%)

examples.input: Calculate a ±5% tick range for the WETH/USDC 0.3% pool
Get tick bounds for a ±10% range around current WETH/USDC price
